title: Kuro’s Plan Against Kaya Is Revealed
description: On pages 6–9, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: She is so nice and caring...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: She calls it an anniver- sary...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Indeed... tomorrow really is a special day...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: EH?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Tonight's moon, it's crescent...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: On a night like this,

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Every cell in my body becomes excited...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: What!!?

dialogue.speaker: Merry
dialogue.text: Clahador-san, why did you break the present?! Ojousama went through so much trouble to get it for you!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I will ask her for my own pre-sents

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: But it won't be a small present like this...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I want... everything in this house...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: WHA...!? What...?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: There's no need to continue this act...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Because in just a couple of hours, this village will be over- taken by pirates

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Three years... is way too long...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Captain Jango!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's morning already...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Time to wake up!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Ah, Captain, good morning

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Good morning

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: You idiots! It's not morning yet! Don't say "Good morning"!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: The moon is still out, it's still midnight!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Yes sir! Sorry!

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
